Description: Bohemian-chic tote in vibrant purple printed cotton, featuring a playful cat-and-floral motif and contrasting orange-and-blue tropical print straps.
Festive gray canvas tote accented with two horizontal bands of poinsettia-and-snowflake ribbon for a subtle holiday flourish.
Fabric: Cotton canvas with embroidered ribbon trim

Description: Sunny red canvas tote with a bold mustard-and-olive striped hem, adding a warm, graphic contrast to a classic silhouette.
Fabric: Cotton canvas with woven stripe trim

Description: Artisanal woven tote in a neutral tweed-like fabric, highlighted by a peek of plaid lining at the neckline for a touch of tailored refinement.
Fabric: Textured woven blend with plaid interior detail

Description: Vibrant botanical tote in richly colored printed cotton, showcasing oversized floral and bird imagery in electric blue, orange, and red tones with matching printed straps.
Bohemian-chic tote in vibrant purple printed cotton, featuring a whimsical jungle-cat and floral motif at the base, finished with contrasting indigo wave-striped straps.
Sunny red canvas tote with a bold mustard, olive, and burgundy striped hem, adding a warm, graphic flourish to its classic silhouette.
Fabric: Cotton canvas with woven stripe trim

Description: Midnight black canvas tote scattered with playful embroidered birds, butterflies, and blossoms in jewel-tone threads, with a hint of gingham lining at the neckline.
Casual mixed-media tote combining a blue-green plaid linen upper panel with a sturdy indigo denim base for a smart, everyday carryall.
Luminous golden-orange silk-blend tote adorned with artful patchwork of tonal floral-print squares for an elegant, handcrafted look.
Forest-green linen tote accented with a handwoven ikat-style stripe panel in chartreuse, aqua, and yellow, punctuated by red diamond motifs.
Two-tone tote combining raw denim on top with vibrant cobalt-blue linen below, separated by a narrow tribal-inspired jacquard ribbon trim.
Fabric: Denim and linen with jacquard trim

Description: Slate-gray canvas tote embroidered with double rows of red and white floral motifs on a black band, evoking a heritage folk aesthetic.
Charcoal-grey canvas shoulder bag featuring forest-green and mustard botanical-print stripes at the hem, accented by stitched ric-rac edges.
Quilted navy cotton tote detailed with a bold southwestern geometric jacquard band in teal, ivory, and black for textured interest.
Olive-green canvas tote with contrasting striped cotton-webbing straps in varying shades of green for a tonal, outdoorsy look.
Tri-tone canvas shopper featuring natural undyed cotton top and bottom panels framing a bold cobalt center, detailed with an upcycled denim pocket.
Chambray denim tote accented with a diagonal dark-wash denim sash and a repurposed jeans back-pocket for a modern patchwork aesthetic.
Sky-blue cotton tote trimmed at the hem with a multicolored rainbow stitch band, adding a playful pop of pastel embroidery.
Olive-linen shoulder bag detailed with two horizontal woven ribbon bands in mint and emerald hues, echoing the stripe-patterned strap lining.
Deep teal cotton tote accented with a handwoven ikat border in chartreuse, lemon, and ivory hues highlighted by subtle red medallion motifs.
Lagoon-teal cotton shopper featuring an ikat-inspired weave band in mint, gold, and sky stripes for a boho-chic accent.
Pistachio-green cotton sling bag in a clean, single-panel silhouette for a fresh, minimalist look.
Soft mint cotton tote in a seamless design, offering a pastel-toned, everyday carry essential.
Apple-green cotton shoulder bag trimmed at the hem with vibrant Madras plaid checks in citrus orange, lemon yellow, and teal.
Periwinkle satin tote printed with bold brown abstract swirls and accented by hand-stitched black cord embroidery for a sculptural, modern look.
Natural linen shoulder bag trimmed along the hem with a wide tan canvas stripe and a narrow black-and-white floral jacquard ribbon for a subtle heritage touch.
Creamy linen tote with a tailored bottom band of multicolor ticking stripes above a warm tan canvas panel for a softly tailored accent.
Charcoal linen shopper featuring a trio of decorative trims at the hem: red floral grosgrain, dark green cord, and a multicolor jacquard ribbon for layered texture.
Taupe cotton canvas tote with a bottom panel in floral tapestry jacquard showcasing muted blooms on a woven grid background.
Taupe herringbone tote featuring alternating stripes of cream, white, and pale blue in a classic herringbone weave, highlighted by dark green zigzag stitch accents for a handcrafted feel.
Indigo cotton canvas bag printed with tonal diamond microdots and geometric fade, trimmed at the hem and straps with multicolor pinstriped cotton for a vibrant contrast.
Two-tone canvas shopper in navy and soft mint, featuring a repurposed denim pocket appliqué with white topstitching for practical flair.
Blush pink cotton tote printed with painterly feather and leaf motifs in fuchsia, teal, and brown, finished with a matching decorative fringe trim at the waist for artisanal flair.
